name: Deep-Fry Fiddleheads
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the flour, salt, and baking powder. Stir in 15 ml of oil and milk. Beat with a rotary beater until smooth and creamy.
2. Heat the remaining oil in a small skillet over high heat.
3. Dip fiddleheads into the batter coating, then fry in hot fat.
4. Fry until golden brown, drain on paper towels.
5. Serve hot.
